summary: Frontend-only verification of new Home CTAs (Become a service provider, Admin login) and TownServe→MonConnect rebrand. All 6 acceptance scenarios passed end-to-end on mobile viewport (390x844). CTAs render at bottom of Home for guests and customers, are hidden for providers/admins. 'Become a service provider' navigates to /register?role=provider with Provider role pre-selected (active border colors.accent). 'Admin login' navigates to /login. Admin login (admin@townserve.com / Admin@12345) redirects to /admin; provider login (ramesh.kumar@townserve.in / Provider@123) redirects to /provider-dashboard, and when forcibly navigating to /(tabs) the CTAs are not rendered. Customer registration succeeds and CTAs remain visible on home.

issues: Admin panel header still displays user name 'TownServe Admin' because the seed in MongoDB was created prior to rebrand. Backend code now seeds 'MonConnect Admin' (server.py:620) but seed is idempotent so the existing admin user document was not updated. To fix: either run a one-shot migration to set name='MonConnect Admin' where email='admin@townserve.com', or have the seed step upsert the name field. Visible-only issue, no functional impact.

action_items: (Optional / cosmetic) Update seeded admin user's `name` from 'TownServe Admin' to 'MonConnect Admin' so the admin panel header no longer shows the old brand. Either patch via a one-time upsert in the seed function or run a manual mongo update.

(Optional) Demo creds box on /login still references @townserve.com / @townserve.in emails — these are the real seeded emails so changing them would break login. Acceptable as-is; flag for awareness only.
critical_code_review_comments: (tabs)/index.tsx: CTA visibility condition `(!user || user.role === 'customer')` correctly hides CTAs for providers/admins — matches spec.
register.tsx: useLocalSearchParams<{role?: string}>() correctly defaults to 'customer' when role param is anything other than 'provider'.
No hardcoded URLs; uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL via src/api.
All interactive elements have testID — good coverage for automated testing.
seed_data_creation: Registered one ephemeral test customer testcust<timestamp>@example.com / Customer@123 to verify Test 6 (customer registration → CTAs still visible). No cleanup performed; safe to leave in dev DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4 added two Home-page CTAs gated on role and a ?role=provider param on /register. All flows verified on mobile viewport. The only residual cosmetic issue is the seeded admin display name still being 'TownServe Admin' in MongoDB — backend seed code is correct but idempotent. No regressions detected in: home categories load, featured providers load, login/register navigation, admin/provider/customer post-auth routing.
rca_of_issue: N/A — feature passes all acceptance criteria.
